title: HPKE unseal_message: X25519 private key not zeroized after use
description: In core/src/hpke.rs:58-59, sk_recip (deserialized from recipient_secret_bytes) is not zeroized on drop. The hpke crate's X25519 PrivateKey does not implement ZeroizeOnDrop. In a long-running daemon process, private key bytes persist in heap memory after the call returns. Fix: ensure callers pass a Zeroizing<[u8; 32]> and drop it immediately, or wrap the internal PrivateKey in a Zeroizing<> container.
